title: Thai Baobing Custard
description: A Thai-inspired dessert featuring a creamy custard filling and crunchy baobing on top.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the custard and chinese rice flour.
Pour the mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the custard is set.
While the custard is baking, prepare the baobing by crushing it into small pieces.
Once the custard is done, top it with the crushed baobing.
